items.title: Ensure lock screen remains enabled
items.rationale: Keeping the lock screen enabled reduces the chance of unattended desktop access exposure.
items.recommendation: Set NoLockScreen to 0 or leave it unset.

audit_logic.notes: Mapped to the Windows audit JSON output.

remediation_steps.title: Enable the Windows lock screen
remediation_steps.rollback: Revert the registry value if your environment explicitly requires a different lock screen policy.

rollback_notes: Review Windows personalization policy requirements before rollback.

evidence_fields.name: screen_lock
evidence_fields.description: Registry-derived screen lock state from the Windows audit JSON.

items.title: Review maximum password age baseline
items.rationale: Password age is part of the baseline password hygiene posture.
items.recommendation: Validate password age policy using imported benchmark material and Windows account policy evidence.

audit_logic.notes: Seeded as report-traceable but manual until deeper policy extraction is implemented.

remediation_steps.title: Review password age policy
remediation_steps.expected_impact: Aligns local password age to the approved profile.
remediation_steps.rollback: Restore the previous password age after change review if needed.

rollback_notes: Record the previous password age before modification.

evidence_fields.name: password_policy_review
evidence_fields.description: Approved evidence proving the selected maximum password age.

items.title: Ensure GDM automatic mounting of removable media is disabled
items.rationale: Disabling automount reduces removable-media attack surface on workstation systems.
items.recommendation: Disable GDM automount and keep the setting locked.

audit_logic.notes: Mapped to the Linux audit JSON systemState.status value.

remediation_steps.title: Disable GDM automount
remediation_steps.command: Review and run the appropriate GDM hardening script in the Linux toolkit.
remediation_steps.expected_impact: Brings removable-media handling closer to CIS guidance.
remediation_steps.rollback: Use the corresponding Linux unharden script if operationally required.

rollback_notes: Use the matching Linux unharden script if approved.

evidence_fields.name: systemState.status
evidence_fields.description: Status field from the Linux GDM audit JSON.

items.title: Ensure UFW default deny firewall policy
items.rationale: A deny-by-default firewall stance reduces unnecessary network exposure.
items.recommendation: Enable UFW and set the default deny policy.

audit_logic.notes: Mapped to Linux UFW audit JSON evidence.

remediation_steps.title: Enable UFW deny by default
remediation_steps.command: Review and run the appropriate UFW hardening script in the Linux toolkit.
remediation_steps.expected_impact: Improves firewall posture against benchmark expectations.
remediation_steps.rollback: Use the Linux UFW unharden script if rollback is approved.

rollback_notes: Record current firewall policy before rollback.

evidence_fields.name: ufw_status
evidence_fields.description: Firewall status from the Linux audit JSON.
